description_long: This is an above-ground, octagonal jacuzzi with a wooden exterior frame and a bright blue interior water basin. The jacuzzi features a set of wooden steps with three treads attached to one side, providing easy access to the water. A metal ladder is also present, extending from the deck into the water for additional entry and exit support. On one side, there is a visible external filtration or pump unit, likely for water circulation and cleaning. The water inside appears clean and nearly fills the basin, with the surface reflecting light. The overall design is robust and suitable for outdoor placement in urban gardens, patios, or recreational areas.
description: An octagonal, above-ground wooden jacuzzi with blue water, wooden steps, a metal ladder, and an external pump unit.
description_view_0: The jacuzzi is seen from a corner angle, highlighting the wooden steps and metal ladder on the near side.
description_view_1: A side view showing the full length of the jacuzzi, the steps, and the external pump unit attached to the far right.
description_view_2: The opposite end view, focusing on the pump unit and the metal ladder, with the steps less visible.
description_view_3: A clear side view with the metal ladder visible at the far end and no steps or pump unit in sight.
attribute_water_level: nearly full, water surface close to the top edge
